untranslatable_reason: Double Top pattern requires identifying two distinct peaks at similar levels with a valley between them. This requires multi-bar pattern recognition (peaks at bars N and N-M) that cannot be expressed as single-bar indicator conditions. The pattern logic 'two peaks near same level + retreat + breakout below valley' requires historical high/low comparison across multiple bars which is beyond the scope of single-bar indicator operators. Core entry uses Donchian breakout below 20-day low as proxy, but true pattern confirmation (two comparable peaks) cannot be validated.
